title: Natco Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Natco Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
